name: action:Approved ✅
description: Pull request is ready to be merged

name: action:Changes required 🔨
description: Pull request was reviewed and additional work is required

name: action:DO NOT MERGE ⛔️
description: Pull request should not be merged

name: action:Hotfix 🔥
description: Pull requests that immediately fix a bug

name: action:Merge 🚀
description: Pull request needs to be automatically merged

name: action:Ready for review 👌
description: Pull request is ready to be reviewed

name: action:Work in progress ⏳
description: Pull request is being worked on and is not ready for review
